ddls:
CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team belongs to */,
  "home_ground" TEXT /* Home ground of the team */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the team coach */,
  "captain" TEXT /* Name of the team captain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the match belongs to */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the first team */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the second team */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue of the match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "temperature" INTEGER /* Temperature in degrees Celsius during the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_match_stats" (
  "stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team match stats */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Runs scored by the team */,
  "wickets" INTEGER /* Wickets taken by the team */,
  "overs" REAL /* Overs bowled by the team */,
  "required_run_rate" REAL /* Required run rate for the team */,
  "net_run_rate" REAL /* Net run rate of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_match_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_match_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "umpires" (
  "umpire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each umpire */,
  "umpire_name" TEXT /* Name of the umpire */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Experience of the umpire in years */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the umpire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("umpire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match official */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "umpire_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the umpire */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the official (e.g., on-field umpire, TV umpire, referee) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_officials_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_officials_umpire_id FOREIGN KEY ("umpire_id") REFERENCES umpires ("umpire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the venue was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_teams" (
  "player_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year the player started playing for the team */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year the player ended playing for the team */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player in the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_match_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player match award */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award (e.g., Man of the Match, Man of the Series) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_match_awards_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match comment */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "commentator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commentator */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_time" TEXT /* Time when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_comments_commentator_id FOREIGN KEY ("commentator_id") REFERENCES commentators ("commentator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_comments_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commentators" (
  "commentator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commentator */,
  "commentator_name" TEXT /* Name of the commentator */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Experience of the commentator in years */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the commentator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commentator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the stadium was established */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)
